title: KKTN-020 business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Airi-chan Airi Kosaka
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is Airi-chan, who has a strange sex appeal. H pant voice echoes in the room where the concrete is left untouched! It feels so good that it quickly becomes a crab crotch, so I'm sorry if it's hard to see (;'Д `) It was a metamorphosis older sister who erected on a nipple bing while rowing an exercise bike!
